chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-360 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 20-03-2024 Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Accordingly this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
